creator: paulius@devnull.lt
text:
Hello,

after further investigation, I came up with this patch, which fixes
configure warning (which probably is harmless), and makes port
work after all.

diff -ruN x11/e17-module-language.orig/files/patch-configure x11/e17-module-language/files/patch-configure
--- x11/e17-module-language.orig/files/patch-configure	2006-09-17 04:39:06.000000000 +0000
+++ x11/e17-module-language/files/patch-configure	2007-07-25 19:48:26.000000000 +0000
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
---- configure.orig	Sun Jul  9 23:28:34 2006
-+++ configure	Sun Jul  9 23:29:18 2006
-@@ -22091,6 +22091,11 @@
+--- configure.orig	2007-02-26 23:58:14.000000000 +0000
++++ configure	2007-07-25 18:49:09.000000000 +0000
+@@ -23135,6 +23135,11 @@
  cat >>conftest.$ac_ext <<_ACEOF
  /* end confdefs.h.  */
  $ac_includes_default
@@ -12,7 +12,7 @@
  #include <$ac_header>
  _ACEOF
  rm -f conftest.$ac_objext
-@@ -22135,6 +22140,11 @@
+@@ -23175,6 +23180,11 @@
  cat confdefs.h >>conftest.$ac_ext
  cat >>conftest.$ac_ext <<_ACEOF
  /* end confdefs.h.  */
@@ -23,4 +23,16 @@
 +#include <X11/extensions/XKBconfig.h>
  #include <$ac_header>
  _ACEOF
- if { (eval echo "$as_me:$LINENO: \"$ac_cpp conftest.$ac_ext\"") >&5
+ if { (ac_try="$ac_cpp conftest.$ac_ext"
+@@ -23280,6 +23290,11 @@
+ cat >>conftest.$ac_ext <<_ACEOF
+ /* end confdefs.h.  */
+ $ac_includes_default
++#include <X11/Xlib.h>
++#include <X11/Xos.h>
++#include <X11/XKBlib.h>
++#include <X11/extensions/XKBfile.h>
++#include <X11/extensions/XKBconfig.h>
+ #include <$ac_header>
+ _ACEOF
+ rm -f conftest.$ac_objext
diff -ruN x11/e17-module-language.orig/files/patch-src::module::e_mod_lang.c x11/e17-module-language/files/patch-src::module::e_mod_lang.c
--- x11/e17-module-language.orig/files/patch-src::module::e_mod_lang.c	1970-01-01 00:00:00.000000000 +0000
+++ x11/e17-module-language/files/patch-src::module::e_mod_lang.c	2007-07-25 19:48:26.000000000 +0000
@@ -0,0 +1,29 @@
+--- src/module/e_mod_lang.c.orig	2007-07-25 19:23:25.000000000 +0000
++++ src/module/e_mod_lang.c	2007-07-25 19:23:31.000000000 +0000
+@@ -12,7 +12,7 @@
+ /******************************************************/
+ 
+ #ifdef __FreeBSD__
+-   #define DFLT_XKB_RULES_FILE   "/usr/X11R6/lib/X11/xkb/rules/xfree86"
++   #define DFLT_XKB_RULES_FILE   "/usr/local/share/X11/xkb/rules/xorg"
+ #else
+    #define DFLT_XKB_RULES_FILE   "/etc/X11/xkb/rules/xfree86"
+ #endif // __FreeBSD__
+@@ -210,7 +210,7 @@
+    if (!result || result == -1)
+      { 
+ #ifdef __FreeBSD__
+-	result = exml_file_read(exml, "/usr/X11R6/lib/X11/xkb/rules/xfree86.xml");
++	result = exml_file_read(exml, "/usr/local/share/X11/xkb/rules/xorg.xml");
+ #else
+ 	result = exml_file_read(exml, "/usr/lib/X11/xkb/rules/xfree86.xml");
+ #endif // __FreeBSD__
+@@ -300,7 +300,7 @@
+    if (!result || result == -1)
+      { 
+ #ifdef __FreeBSD__
+-	result = exml_file_read(exml, "/usr/X11R6/lib/X11/xkb/rules/xfree86.xml");
++	result = exml_file_read(exml, "/usr/local/share/X11/xkb/rules/xorg.xml");
+ #else
+ 	result = exml_file_read(exml, "/usr/lib/X11/xkb/rules/xfree86.xml");
+ #endif // __FreeBSD__
